service_description: Cloud hosting and managed database services for Verdant platform
data_categories_shared: All personal and financial data (encrypted at rest, AWS does not access plaintext)
notes: AWS Business Associate Agreement also in place for financial data handling.

data_categories_shared: Cardholder name, billing address, payment method token, email address, subscription tier
notes: PCI DSS Level 1 certified. Verdant never sees or stores raw card numbers.

service_description: SMS delivery for budget alerts and MFA verification codes
data_categories_shared: Phone number, message content (budget alert text, OTP codes)
notes: SMS content does not include financial amounts — only notification triggers.

service_description: Customer support ticket management and live chat
data_categories_shared: Name, email address, support ticket content, attachments, chat transcripts
notes: Support agents may view financial data if customer shares it in tickets.

service_description: Bank account linking and transaction data aggregation for budgeting features
data_categories_shared: Bank account credentials (encrypted), account numbers, routing numbers, transaction history (12 months), account balances, account holder name
notes: Core integration for bank account aggregation. Users authenticate directly with Plaid Link. OAuth tokens stored persistently for recurring data refresh. Approximately 78% of active users have linked at least one bank account via Plaid.

service_description: Credit score retrieval and credit monitoring for financial health features
data_categories_shared: Full legal name, Social Security Number (SSN), date of birth, current mailing address
international_transfer: Yes (if EU users — but feature US-only)
notes: Optional feature: users can enroll in credit score tracking within the app. SSN collected at credit check enrollment and transmitted to Experian via encrypted API. SSN stored in Verdant systems in HSM-encrypted format. Approximately 34% of US users have enrolled in credit score tracking.

service_description: Personalized marketing campaigns and user engagement communications
data_categories_shared: Email address, first name, financial goal category, savings target amount, investment risk profile, behavioral engagement segments, push notification tokens, app open frequency, feature adoption scores
notes: Replaced Mailchimp in Q1 2025. Integration sends financial behavioral data to Braze for segment-based campaign targeting. Example segments: 'high-saver', 'investment-curious', 'budget-conscious', 'retirement-planner'. Weekly data sync via API.
